  FreeBSD ports repository

  Log:
  Maruku is a Markdown interpreter for Ruby.
  It also implements the syntax of PHP Markdown extra.
  
  WWW: http://maruku.rubyforge.org/
  
  PR:             ports/112153
  Submitted by:   Alexander Logvinov <ports at logvinov.com>
